nasb.text: The lines have fallen to me in pleasant places; Indeed, my heritage is beautiful to me.

esv.text: The lines have fallen for me in pleasant places; indeed, I have a beautiful inheritance.

cnv.text: 準繩量給我的是佳美之地， 我的產業實在令我喜悅。

ccb.text: 你赐我佳美之地， 我的产业何其美！

csbs.text: 你为我划界的量绳落在美福之地， 我的继业实在美好！
